query:
CREATE TABLE `form_assignments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`sessionId` int NOT NULL,
	`formType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`formTitle` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`routingDepartment` varchar(255),
	`routingEmail` varchar(320),
	`sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`fieldData` json,
	`signatureName` varchar(255),
	`signatureTitle` varchar(255),
	`signedAt` timestamp,
	`submittedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `form_assignments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `magic_links` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`sessionId` int NOT NULL,
	`token` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`customerEmail` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`usedAt` timestamp,
	`accessCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `magic_links_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `magic_links_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);

CREATE TABLE `onboarding_sessions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`salespersonId` int NOT NULL,
	`salespersonName` varchar(255),
	`salespersonEmail` varchar(320),
	`customerName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`customerEmail` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`customerCompany` varchar(255),
	`customerType` enum('importer','exporter','both','custom') NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed','expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `onboarding_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `uploaded_documents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`sessionId` int NOT NULL,
	`formAssignmentId` int,
	`uploadedByEmail` varchar(320),
	`fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`fileKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` text NOT NULL,
	`mimeType` varchar(128),
	`fileSize` int,
	`description` varchar(255),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `uploaded_documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
